name: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil and cook pasta according to package directions.
While pasta cooks, fry bacon in a large pan until crispy.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs, grated cheese, and black pepper.
Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup of pasta water.
Add hot pasta to the pan with bacon, remove from heat.
Quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water to create a creamy sauce.
Serve immediately with extra cheese and black pepper.

name: Tomato Basil Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta in boiling salted water.
Sauté minced garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until softened.
Toss in cooked pasta and fresh basil leaves.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

name: Beef Stroganoff
instructions: Sauté sliced beef in butter until browned.
Add onions and mushrooms, cooking until tender.
Stir in sour cream and simmer gently.
Serve over cooked pasta or rice.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and brown in oil.
Add broccoli and sauté until bright green.
Stir in ginger, garlic, and soy sauce.
Garnish with roasted peanuts and serve with rice.

name: Greek Salad
instructions: Chop cucumber, tomato, and onion into chunks.
Combine in a bowl with olives and crumbled feta.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with oregano.
Toss gently and serve chilled.

name: Pan-Seared Salmon
instructions: Season salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Sear in a hot pan with butter and garlic for 4-5 mins per side.
Sauté asparagus in the same pan until tender-crisp.
Finish with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.

name: Pork Chops with Apples
instructions: Sear pork chops in butter until golden brown.
Remove pork and sauté sliced apples and onions.
Add cinnamon and rosemary for aroma.
Return pork to pan and simmer until cooked through.

name: Walnut Pesto Pasta
instructions: Toast walnuts in a dry pan until fragrant.
Blend walnuts, basil, garlic, and parmesan with olive oil.
Toss pesto with freshly cooked pasta.
Add a splash of pasta water for creaminess.

name: Tuna Melt
instructions: Mix canned tuna with mayo and diced celery.
Spread on bread slices and top with cheese.
Butter the outside of the bread.
Grill in a pan until cheese is melted and bread is golden.

name: Peanut Butter Noodles
instructions: Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, honey, and lime juice.
Thin the sauce with a little hot noodle water.
Toss with cooked noodles and chili oil.
Top with crushed peanuts if available.

name: Fish Tacos
instructions: Season and grill or fry white fish fillets.
Shred cabbage and mix with lime juice.
Warm tortillas and fill with fish and slaw.
Top with crema and fresh cilantro.

name: Bacon Wrapped Asparagus
instructions: Wrap each asparagus spear with a slice of bacon.
Season with pepper and garlic powder.
Roast at 400°F (200°C) until bacon is crispy.
Serve as a side or appetizer.

name: Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Sauté garlic in butter until fragrant.
Add shrimp and cook until pink.
Stir in lemon juice and parsley.
Toss with cooked pasta.

name: Pork Fried Rice
instructions: Dice pork and fry until cooked through.
Scramble eggs in the same pan.
Add cooked rice, peas, and carrots.
Stir in soy sauce and fry until well combined.

name: Almond Crusted Chicken
instructions: Crush almonds into fine crumbs.
Dredge chicken in flour, then egg, then almonds.
Bake until chicken is cooked and crust is golden.
Serve with a lemon wedge.

name: Miso Glazed Cod
instructions: Mix miso, mirin, sugar, and ginger into a glaze.
Coat cod fillets and marinate for 30 mins.
Broil until fish is flaky and glaze is caramelized.
Serve with steamed bok choy.

name: Cashew Chicken
instructions: Stir fry chicken chunks until browned.
Add peppers, onions, and cashews.
Stir in soy sauce and hoisin sauce.
Cook until sauce thickens and coats everything.

name: BBQ Pulled Pork
instructions: Slow cook pork with onion and garlic until tender.
Shred the pork and mix with BBQ sauce.
Serve on toasted buns with coleslaw.
A long cook time but worth the effort!

name: Pecan Crusted Tilapia
instructions: Mix crushed pecans and bread crumbs.
Brush tilapia with honey mustard mixture.
Press pecan crumbs onto the fish.
Bake until fish is flaky and crust is toasted.

name: Sausage and Peppers
instructions: Brown sausages in a pan and slice.
Sauté sliced peppers and onions until soft.
Combine sausage and vegetables with garlic.
Serve on hoagie rolls.

name: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic in butter.
Add rice and toast slightly.
Slowly add broth, stirring constantly until absorbed.
Stir in mushrooms and parmesan at the end.

name: Chicken Alfredo
instructions: Cook pasta and set aside.
Cook chicken strips in butter and garlic.
Add cream and parmesan to make a sauce.
Toss everything together.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown ground beef with taco seasoning.
Warm tortillas in a pan.
Assemble with lettuce, cheese, tomato, and onion.

name: Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté vegetables until soft.
Add lentils, broth, and tomatoes.
Simmer until lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper.

name: Eggplant Parmesan
instructions: Slice and bread eggplant slices.
Fry or bake until crispy.
Layer with sauce and cheeses.
Bake until bubbly and golden.

name: Shrimp Fried Rice
instructions: Cook shrimp and set aside.
Scramble eggs and set aside.
Fry vegetables and rice, then add shrimp and eggs back.
Season with soy sauce.

name: Quinoa Salad
instructions: Cook quinoa and let cool.
Chop vegetables and mix with quinoa.
Dress with lemon juice and olive oil.
Top with feta cheese.

name: Beef Stew
instructions: Brown beef chunks in a pot.
Add vegetables and broth.
Simmer for 2 hours until beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Cook chicken and vegetables.
Place on tortilla with cheese and fold.
Grill until cheese is melted.
Serve with salsa.

name: Vegetable Curry
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic.
Add vegetables and curry powder.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer.
Serve with rice.

name: Pork Ramen
instructions: Simmer ginger and garlic in broth.
Cook noodles and soft-boil eggs.
Sear pork slices.
Assemble bowl with broth, noodles, pork, and egg.

name: Caprese Skewers
instructions: Thread tomato, mozzarella, and basil onto skewers.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Season with salt and pepper.

name: Baked Cod
instructions: Place cod in a baking dish.
Top with melted butter, garlic, and bread crumbs.
Bake until fish is flaky.
Garnish with parsley and lemon.

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
instructions: Cook beef and rice, then mix with sauce.
Stuff into hollowed bell peppers.
Top with cheese and bake.
Serve hot.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Grill chicken and slice into strips.
Toss lettuce with dressing and parmesan.
Top with chicken and croutons.

name: Pesto Chicken
instructions: Make pesto by blending basil, walnuts, parmesan, oil, and garlic.
Spread over chicken breasts.
Bake until chicken is cooked through.

name: Beef and Broccoli
instructions: Thinly slice beef and sear in a pan.
Add broccoli and stir fry.
Stir in soy sauce, ginger, and garlic.
Serve with rice.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
instructions: Cut chicken into small cubes and marinate with soy sauce and cornstarch.
SMince garlic and ginger, and cut scallions into small pieces.
Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry dried chilies and peppercorns until fragrant.
Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked through.
Add garlic, ginger, and scallions, and stir-fry for another minute.
Stir in a sauce made of soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar.
Add roasted peanuts and toss everything together.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

name: Pork Souvlaki
instructions: Marinate pork in lemon, garlic, and herbs.
Skewer and grill until cooked.
Serve in pita bread with tzatziki.

name: Vegetable Lasagna
instructions: Layer pasta sheets with sauce, cheese, and vegetables.
Repeat layers until pan is full.
Bake until bubbly and golden.

name: Chicken Enchiladas
instructions: Roll cooked chicken and cheese into tortillas.
Place in a dish and cover with sauce and more cheese.
Bake until melted.

name: Beef Stir Fry with Cashews
instructions: Stir fry beef and vegetables.
Add cashews and sauces.
Cook until heated through.
Serve with rice.

name: Salmon with Walnut Crust
instructions: Mix crushed walnuts with honey and mustard.
Press onto salmon fillets.
Bake until fish is flaky.

name: Pork and Apple Salad
instructions: Cook pork and slice into strips.
Toss with apples, lettuce, and walnuts.
Dress with vinegar and oil.

name: Gluten-Free Pancakes
instructions: Blend ingredients into a batter.
Cook on a griddle until golden.
Serve with syrup.

name: Tuna Salad Sandwich
instructions: Mix tuna with mayo and vegetables.
Spread on bread and top with lettuce.

name: Chicken Satay
instructions: Marinate chicken in peanut sauce.
Skewer and grill.
Serve with extra sauce.

name: Beef and Mushroom Pasta
instructions: Cook beef and mushrooms.
Add cream and garlic to make a sauce.
Toss with pasta.

name: Pork and Broccoli Stir Fry
instructions: Stir fry pork and broccoli.
Add seasonings and cook until tender.

name: Fish and Chips
instructions: Batter fish and fry until golden.
Fry potato wedges.
Serve with lemon.
